summary: Verified responsive layout (mobile 390, tablet 820, desktop 1440/1920) and 3 copy changes across the Saksham portfolio. All required data-testid hooks (mobile-topbar, mobile-menu-btn, mobile-palette-btn, sidebar-desktop, sidebar-mobile, nav-{key}) are present and behave correctly. Mobile top bar shows only <md; desktop sidebar is display:none on mobile; sidebar-desktop visible + labeled SAKSHAM SHUKLA on tablet/desktop. Hamburger opens drawer with all 6 nav items; clicking any nav item navigates and closes drawer (screenshot confirms — drawer container uses opacity-0/pointer-events-none, so Playwright is_visible reports True even when visually closed; functional behavior is correct). No horizontal overflow at 390/768/1024/1440. Copy updates verified: currentStatus.availability='Open to Product Designer roles + collaborations' (old 'Onboarding 3 design partners' absent). Case study list shows 'Experience Designer · 2024' for Hyundai×B&O and 'Designer · 2023' for One Audio; old 'Lead Product Designer' and 'UX/UI Designer' fully removed from both list and detail views. Regression: crab-avatar loads on mobile, 'Open Bracket' CTA still renders on Bracket detail, Cmd+K palette opens on desktop and mobile-palette-btn opens palette on mobile.
critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar mobile drawer uses opacity/pointer-events to toggle rather than display; this is fine but a minor testability nit — adding `hidden` when closed would make Playwright/AT report visibility more accurately. Not blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend only was tested. Responsive breakpoints validated at 390 (mobile), 820 (tablet), 1024, 1440, 1920 (desktop). All data-testid attributes for MobileTopBar/Sidebar/nav items are wired and working. Copy email function lives in AboutMe.jsx (not Contact section) and CommandPalette.jsx — both use 'shuklasaksham01@gmail.com'.
